notes: v3.0.27 — CHK-207: common English words typed on the Hebrew keyboard at sentence start (what, how, what is, how much, lets see, again and again) now convert to English. Their mapped-Hebrew form is a valid dictionary word, so the engine had treated them as intentional Hebrew and skipped conversion. Fix encodes frequency asymmetry. Added 'is' to the 2-char allowlist; pruned 'her' (collides with יקר).
